animations.summary_box: Slide up from bottom with spring physics
animations.waveform: Sine wave animation, pulsating heights based on TTS audio or simulated
animations.capture_flash: Opacity 0 to 1 to 0 over 300ms, white background

CameraViewfinder.description: Full screen camera behind all UI.

elements.name: Brackets
elements.description: 4 corner brackets, 40px length, 4px thickness, color text_dim, turning #4ade80 on success

elements.name: MicDot
elements.colors: pulse green when listening, amber when speaking

BottomControls.layout: Row, space-between, align center, padding horizontally 32px

SummaryBox.style: bg #18140f, top rounded 24px, subtle top border

DocumentDrawerModal.description: Full screen modal with page pills.

elements.name: PagePills
elements.style: horizontal scroll, pill shape bg text_dim for inactive, bg accent for active

HelpOverlay.style: Small circle '?' icon, opens full screen instructions.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to #f0e6d0 on #18140f for all readable text.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48 logical pixels for all interactive elements.
accessibility.screen_reader: Use accessibilityLabel, accessibilityHint, and accessibilityRole on all custom buttons. Announce state changes (e.g., 'Processing document', 'Speaking').
accessibility.test_ids: Apply testID (React Native equivalent of data-testid) to all interactive and key informational elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Project is an Expo React Native app using expo-router.
All files should be in .js or .jsx.
Use StyleSheet or NativeWind/Tailwind for styling. NativeWind is preferred if Tailwind is used.
Use 'expo-camera' or 'react-native-vision-camera' for the camera feed.
Use React Native Reanimated for the waveform, sliding panel, and corner bracket success animations.
Use 'expo-speech' for TTS and a suitable audio/speech-to-text library for voice commands, or mock them seamlessly.
Ensure the camera is the absolute background (z-index 0) and UI elements overlay it.
Maintain the exact specified colors: bg #18140f, text #f0e6d0, accent #c8781a, dim rgba(240,230,208,0.45).
Use Georgia for reading text (Splash title, summary content, drawer content) and System Sans for UI labels.
Do not use HTML tags; use <View>, <Text>, <TouchableOpacity>, <Modal>, etc.
Implement testID='kebab-case-name' on all interactive elements.
Do not use generic placeholder images or text.
